'''Jor Nieler''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. He served as a squad leader for a group of [[Security Police/Legends|Espos]] stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kirima (Kalinda system)|Kirima]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
